assertions.assertion: A policy is defined that includes RequireClaim("scope", "catalog.write") for client-level authorization
The same policy includes RequireRole("admin") or equivalent user-level claim check
The policy is applied to the DELETE /products/{id} endpoint
The response explains that scopes represent client permissions and roles/claims represent user permissions, and both should be checked
assertions.rationale: The response explains scope is about what the application is allowed to do and role is about what the user is allowed to do.
